Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User exists in the system with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the username "john_doe".
3. User enters the password "password123".
4. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- User is logged in successfully.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User exists in the system with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the username "john_doe".
3. User enters the password "wrong_password".
4. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- User is not logged in.
- An error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the logout button.
Expected Result:
- User is logged out successfully.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Preconditions: Admin exists in the system with valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the login page.
2. Admin enters the username "admin_user".
3. Admin enters the password "admin_password".
4. Admin clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- Admin is logged in successfully.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: Admin logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: Admin exists in the system with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the login page.

Title: Admin logs out successfully
Test Steps: 1. Admin clicks the logout button.
Expected Result:
- Admin is logged out successfully.

Title: User starts an activity successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the home page.
2. User initiates the activity.
Expected Result:
- User is directed to the fragments page.
- User completes the activity successfully.

Title: User performs intermediate processing successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and initiated the activity
Test Steps: 1. User performs the intermediate processing.
Expected Result:
- Intermediate processing is completed successfully.
- User is directed to the end point.

Title: User completes the activity successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and performed intermediate processing
Test Steps: 1. User reaches the end point.
Expected Result:
- Activity is completed successfully.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: User inserts a new item successfully
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the insertion process.
2. User provides the new item details.
3. User submits the new item.
Expected Result:
- Item is inserted successfully into the database.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: User retrieves items from the database successfully
Test Steps: 1. User requests to retrieve items from the database.
Expected Result:
- Items are retrieved successfully from the database.
- Items are displayed to the user.

Title: User exchanges data with the database successfully
Test Steps:
1. User sends exchange data to the Exchange.
2. Exchange retrieves exchanges from the Database.
Expected Result:
- Exchange data is processed successfully.
- Exchanges are retrieved and displayed to the user.

Title: User applies a filter successfully
Test Steps:
1. User inserts a filter criterion.
2. User views the filtered results.
3. User inserts a new filter criterion.
4. User views the new filtered results.
Expected Result:
- Filtered results are displayed successfully.
- User can view and apply multiple filters.

Title: User inserts new information successfully
Test Steps: 1. User inserts new information into the database.
Expected Result:
- New information is inserted successfully into the database.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: User shows updated information successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has updated information
Test Steps: 1. User sends updated information to another user.
Expected Result:
- Updated information is sent successfully to another user.
- A success message is displayed.

Title: User inserts invalid information
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to insert invalid information into the database.
Expected Result:
- Invalid information is not inserted into the database.
- An error message is displayed indicating invalid information.

Title: User shows invalid updated information
Preconditions: User is logged in and has invalid updated information
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to send invalid updated information to another user.
Expected Result:
- Invalid updated information is not sent to another user.
- An error message is displayed indicating invalid information.

Title: User retrieves non-existent items from the database
Test Steps: 1. User requests to retrieve non-existent items from the database.
Expected Result:
- No items are retrieved from the database.
- An appropriate message is displayed indicating no items found.

Title: User exchanges non-existent data with the database
Test Steps:
1. User sends non-existent exchange data to the Exchange.
2. Exchange attempts to retrieve exchanges from the Database.
Expected Result:
- Non-existent exchange data is not processed.
- An appropriate message is displayed indicating no exchanges found.

Title: User applies an invalid filter
Test Steps:
1. User inserts an invalid filter criterion.
2. User views the filtered results.
Expected Result:
- Invalid filter criteria are not applied.
- An appropriate message is displayed indicating invalid filter criteria.
